Meet Jazmyn

Where flawless
is the standard.


"Let's turn your nails into a true masterpiece — because you deserve to look and feel your best, down to your fingertips."

My name is Jazmyn and I'm a nail artist with over 3.5 years of experience based right here in Charlottesville, Virginia. I've built a deep love and passion for this craft and I'm determined to stay consistent with new sets, new colors, new trends — and results that speak for themselves.

JAZNAILEDTHAT is a private, suite-based studio where every appointment is crafted with intention. No rushed energy, no distractions — just you, great nails, and a space that feels like the experience you deserve. Book with JAZNAILEDTHAT for the experience.

3.5+ Years Experience
1:1 Private Suite
CVA Charlottesville, VA

Book Your Appointment

Ready for a set
that eats every time?

Your luxury nail appointment starts here. Select your service, choose your time, and show up ready to be pampered.

Note: Custom design pricing may increase based on complexity. Please review policies before booking.

Book Appointment View Services
Studio Policies

Good to know
before you book.

🏥
Nail Health First

Services will not be performed on damaged, broken, or sore nail beds. Your nail health is always the priority.

💵
Payment Policy

Remaining balances must be paid in cash. Cash App payments are accepted with a $4 processing fee applied.

🚫
No Extra Guests

Due to the private suite setting, extra guests are not permitted during appointments. This ensures a focused, relaxing experience for you.

👶
No Children

Children are not allowed during appointments. The suite is designed as a calm, distraction-free space — for your benefit and safety.

🔁
Fill-In Policy

Fill-ins are only performed on the artist's own prior work. No exceptions. This ensures quality control and the best possible result.

🛠
Free Fixes

Nail repairs are free within the first 48 hours of your appointment. After 48 hours, a $4 fix fee applies.

🎨
Custom Design Pricing

Inspo looks and custom designs start at the base price listed. Final pricing depends on complexity — discussed at booking.

✦
Booking Deposit A deposit may be required to secure your appointment. This confirms your slot and goes toward your total. Deposit details will be provided at the time of booking. Please arrive on time — late arrivals may result in a shortened service or rescheduling.
FAQ

Questions? Answered.

How do I book an appointment? +
Booking is easy and 100% online. Click any "Book Now" button on this site and you'll be taken to the online booking page where you can select your service, pick a date and time, and confirm your appointment in minutes.
What should I book if I want a custom design? +
If you have a specific look in mind, book the "Your Look" option for your nail length. If you're open to the artist's interpretation, book a "Freestyle" — you choose the color and the artist handles the rest. Both are incredible options. If you're unsure, reach out before booking.
What's the difference between Freestyle and Your Look? +
With Freestyle, the artist has full creative control — you simply choose a color and trust her vision. With Your Look, you bring inspo photos or a specific design idea, and she recreates it. Freestyle pricing is fixed; Your Look pricing may increase based on design complexity.
Do you do fill-ins over another nail tech's work? +
No — fill-ins are only performed on the artist's own prior work. This ensures the quality and integrity of your set. If you're coming from somewhere else, a full new set is the way to go.
How should I prepare for my appointment? +
Come with clean, dry nails. If you have existing acrylics, they'll be soaked off as needed. Have your inspo photos ready if you're booking a custom look. Arrive on time — late arrivals may result in a shortened service or need to reschedule. And most importantly, come ready to be pampered.
What payment methods are accepted? +
Remaining balances are paid in cash. Cash App is also accepted with a $4 processing fee. Plan accordingly and come prepared.
Can I bring a guest? +
No — due to the private suite setting, extra guests are not permitted during appointments. The space is designed for you and your experience only.
What happens if I need a fix after my appointment? +
Fixes are completely free within the first 48 hours of your appointment — just reach out to schedule. After 48 hours, a $4 fix fee applies per nail.
